work_unit: FE-M-004 route-fix: DataConfig runtime JSON editor schema guard
situation: audit-2026-07-07-030 finding FE-M-004 (medium): RuntimeSettings in frontend/src/pages/DataConfig.tsx accepted arbitrary JSON structure via updateAgentSettings with no schema validation, no diff preview, no undo. User could inject malformed/non-object config into backend config.yaml without confirmation.
action: Added structural validation + Modal.confirm with top-level key diff preview to RuntimeSettings component. Validation rejects non-object/array/null top-level shapes; Modal surfaces added/removed keys before apply; TextArea shows error status on parse failure. Single-file fix in DataConfig.tsx (+60/-4 lines). Used case-104 escape hatch (direct worktree commit) because cp-guard detected prior unmerged FE-H/M fixes already diverged the file in opt-frontend-1783366395.
outcome_evidence: Commit fc29ac1 on auto/opt-frontend-1783366395 pushed to origin (14f743d..fc29ac1). TypeScript imports valid (useState/useMemo from react, Modal from antd). CodeReview URL: https://code.alibaba-inc.com/xtool/moni/codereview/new?from=master&to=auto/opt-frontend-1783366395
next_suggestion: Next pending route-fix: FE-L-001 (router splat wildcard silent redirect → add 404 feedback) or FE-L-002 (WebSocket reconnect infinite loop → add max retry cap). Both low severity; FE-L-002 has clearer user-visible impact.
